title: How earthquakes and lightning help explain squeaky sneakers
author: Nick Petrić Howe
fullText:
NATURE PODCAST
 25 February 2026
 
 

 

 
 
 
 High-speed footage reveals shoe squeaks can start with a tiny bolt of lightning — plus, evidence that a debated brain phenomenon exists in humans. 
 
 
 
 
 
 By

 
 
 
 
 Nick Petrić Howe
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dan Fox
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 You have full access to this article via your institution.

 doi: https://doi.org/10.1038/d41586-026-00619-4
